notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Luis García Jr. scores. Curtis Mead to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Luis García Jr. scores. Curtis Mead to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Coby Mayo. Luis García Jr. scores. Curtis Mead to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander grounds out, shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill flies out sharply to center fielder Jacob Young.

notableEvents.label: Leody Taveras pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Leody Taveras grounds into a double play, second baseman Nasim Nuñez to shortstop CJ Abrams to first baseman Luis García Jr. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Leody Taveras out at 1st.
